briefdescription.para: Destructor,.
Copy constructor,.
Move constructor,.
Assignment operator,.
Constructor,.
Getter for private implementation pointer,.
Const getter for private implementation pointer,.
Create a GeneratorVariableTracker object.

detaileddescription.para: Factory method to create a GeneratorVariableTracker. Create a GeneratorVariableTracker with::

simplesect.para: A smart pointer to a GeneratorVariableTracker object.

briefdescription.para: Test if the given analyserVariable is tracked.

detaileddescription.para: Test if the given analyserVariable is tracked.

parameterdescription.para: The pointer to the AnalyserVariable to test.

simplesect.para: true if the analyser variable is tracked, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Test if the given analyserVariable is untracked.

detaileddescription.para: Test if the given analyserVariable is untracked.

parameterdescription.para: The pointer to the AnalyserVariable to test.

simplesect.para: true if the analyser variable is untracked, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Track the given analyserVariable.

detaileddescription.para: Track the given analyserVariable. This will add the analyser variable to the list of tracked variables.

parameterdescription.para: The pointer to the AnalyserVariable to track.

briefdescription.para: Untrack the given analyserVariable.

detaileddescription.para: Untrack the given analyserVariable. This will remove the analyser variable from the list of tracked variables.

parameterdescription.para: The pointer to the AnalyserVariable to untrack.

briefdescription.para: Track all the constants in the given analyserModel.

detaileddescription.para: Track all the constants in the given analyserModel. This will add all the constants in the analyser model to the list of tracked variables.

parameterdescription.para: The pointer to the AnalyserModel which all the constants are to be tracked.

briefdescription.para: Untrack all the constants in the given analyserModel.

detaileddescription.para: Untrack all the constants in the given analyserModel. This will remove all the constants in the analyser model from the list of tracked variables.

parameterdescription.para: The pointer to the AnalyserModel which all the constants are to be untracked.

briefdescription.para: Track all the computed constants in the given analyserModel.

detaileddescription.para: Track all the computed constants in the given analyserModel. This will add all the computed constants in the analyser model to the list of tracked variables.

parameterdescription.para: The pointer to the AnalyserModel which all the computed constants are to be tracked.

briefdescription.para: Untrack all the computed constants in the given analyserModel.

detaileddescription.para: Untrack all the computed constants in the given analyserModel. This will remove all the computed constants in the analyser model from the list of tracked variables.

parameterdescription.para: The pointer to the AnalyserModel which all the computed constants are to be untracked.

briefdescription.para: Track all the algebraic variables in the given analyserModel.

detaileddescription.para: Track all the algebraic variables in the given analyserModel. This will add all the algebraic variables in the analyser model to the list of tracked variables.

parameterdescription.para: The pointer to the AnalyserModel which all the algebraic variables are to be tracked.

briefdescription.para: Untrack all the algebraic variables in the given analyserModel.

detaileddescription.para: Untrack all the algebraic variables in the given analyserModel. This will remove all the algebraic variables in the analyser model from the list of tracked variables.

parameterdescription.para: The pointer to the AnalyserModel which all the algebraic variables are to be untracked.

briefdescription.para: Track all the variables in the given analyserModel.

detaileddescription.para: Track all the variables in the given analyserModel. This will add all the variables in the analyser model to the list of tracked variables. This includes all the constants, computed constants, and algebraic variables.

parameterdescription.para: The pointer to the AnalyserModel which all the variables are to be tracked.

briefdescription.para: Untrack all the variables in the given analyserModel.

detaileddescription.para: Untrack all the variables in the given analyserModel. This will remove all the variables in the analyser model from the list of tracked variables. This includes all the constants, computed constants, and algebraic variables.

parameterdescription.para: The pointer to the AnalyserModel which all the variables are to be untracked.

briefdescription.para: Get the number of tracked constants in the given analyserModel.

detaileddescription.para: Get the number of tracked constants in the given analyserModel.

parameterdescription.para: The pointer to the AnalyserModel for which to get the number of tracked constants.

simplesect.para: The number of tracked constants in the analyser model.

briefdescription.para: Get the number of untracked constants in the given analyserModel.

detaileddescription.para: Get the number of untracked constants in the given analyserModel.

parameterdescription.para: The pointer to the AnalyserModel for which to get the number of untracked constants.

simplesect.para: The number of untracked constants in the analyser model.

briefdescription.para: Get the number of tracked computed constants in the given analyserModel.

detaileddescription.para: Get the number of tracked computed constants in the given analyserModel.

parameterdescription.para: The pointer to the AnalyserModel for which to get the number of tracked computed constants.

simplesect.para: The number of tracked computed constants in the analyser model.

briefdescription.para: Get the number of untracked computed constants in the given analyserModel.

detaileddescription.para: Get the number of untracked computed constants in the given analyserModel.

parameterdescription.para: The pointer to the AnalyserModel for which to get the number of untracked computed constants.

simplesect.para: The number of untracked computed constants in the analyser model.

briefdescription.para: Get the number of tracked algebraic variables in the given analyserModel.

detaileddescription.para: Get the number of tracked algebraic variables in the given analyserModel.

parameterdescription.para: The pointer to the AnalyserModel for which to get the number of tracked algebraic variables.

simplesect.para: The number of tracked algebraic variables in the analyser model.

briefdescription.para: Get the number of untracked algebraic variables in the given analyserModel.

detaileddescription.para: Get the number of untracked algebraic variables in the given analyserModel.

parameterdescription.para: The pointer to the AnalyserModel for which to get the number of untracked algebraic variables.

simplesect.para: The number of untracked algebraic variables in the analyser model.

briefdescription.para: Get the number of tracked variables in the given analyserModel.

detaileddescription.para: Get the number of tracked variables in the given analyserModel.

parameterdescription.para: The pointer to the AnalyserModel for which to get the number of tracked variables.

simplesect.para: The number of tracked variables in the analyser model.

briefdescription.para: Get the number of untracked variables in the given analyserModel.

detaileddescription.para: Get the number of untracked variables in the given analyserModel.

parameterdescription.para: The pointer to the AnalyserModel for which to get the number of untracked variables.

simplesect.para: The number of untracked variables in the analyser model.

briefdescription.para: The GeneratorVariableTracker class.

detaileddescription.para: The GeneratorVariableTracker class is for representing a CellML GeneratorVariableTracker.
